ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: potatoes 58,2%, sunflower oil with high oleic acid content 33%, prepared 8,8% (sugar, onion powder, salt, dextrose, flavor enhancer (monosodium glutamate), hydrolyzed vegetable protein (contains soy), tomato powder, garlic powder, acidulants (citric acid, malic acid), spices (smoked paprika), aroma (contains milk proteins, lactose), aromatic plants (parsley), green pepper powder,  sweetener (aspartame), dye (paprika extract)),

specific_ingredients.ingredient: sunflower oil with high oleic acid
specific_ingredients.text: sunflower oil with high oleic acid content 33%
